honeycomb.cell.title: Honeycomb Cell
honeycomb.cell.body: Each hexagon represents a predictive endpoint (e.g. Honeycomb node). The color indicates domain applicability: green is in-domain, yellow is borderline, and red is out-of-domain. 🧪 overlay indicates that experimental measurements are available.

fate.koc.title: Organic Carbon Adsorption (Koc)
fate.koc.body: Log10 Koc is the organic carbon-normalized adsorption coefficient in L/kg. It measures a pesticide's mobility in soil: higher values indicate tight binding and lower runoff potential.

fate.dt50.title: Soil Degradation Half-life (DT50)
fate.dt50.body: DT50 represents the time in days required for 50% of the active compound to degrade in aerobic soil. Captures persistence liabilities under environmental conditions.

fate.gus.title: Groundwater Ubiquity Score (GUS)
fate.gus.body: GUS classifies leaching potential: GUS = log10(DT50) * (4 - log10(Koc)). Values > 2.8 are leachers, < 1.8 are non-leachers, and between are in the transition zone.

docking.vina_score.title: Vina Docking Score
docking.vina_score.body: Estimated binding affinity in kcal/mol calculated via AutoDock Vina. Lower values represent more stable ligand-receptor complexes (stronger binding).

docking.exhaustiveness.title: Search Exhaustiveness
docking.exhaustiveness.body: Defines the depth of the global search algorithm. Higher values increase accuracy (especially for large ligand conformation spaces) but take longer to compute.

docking.box_size.title: Grid Box Size
docking.box_size.body: The dimensions (in Angstroms) of the search space centered on the binding pocket. Restricts the conformer search domain to the target active site.

generation.mutations.title: CReM Mutations
generation.mutations.body: The number of structural mutations generated per generation cycle. Mutations are derived from a localSQLite database of fragments using size and charge rules.

generation.mpo.title: Multi-Parameter Optimization (MPO)
generation.mpo.body: A composite score weighting ecotox, environmental fate, and mammalian toxicity alongside binding affinity to prioritize pesticide candidates.

ad.status.title: Applicability Domain (AD)
ad.status.body: Classifies whether a query structure lies within the model's training space. Green (IN) is high confidence, Yellow (Borderline) is moderate, and Red (OUT) represents high uncertainty.

tier.badge.title: Prediction Confidence Tiers
tier.badge.body: Tier-1 (Reference Ensembles, high confidence), Tier-2 (Screening assays, medium confidence), Tier-3 (External consensus/OPERA), and Tier-4 (Custom models trained locally).

tox.bee_oral.title: Honeybee Acute Oral LD50
tox.bee_oral.body: Predicted dose (µg/bee) that causes 50% mortality after oral ingestion. Important threshold for pollinator safety screening.

tox.bee_contact.title: Honeybee Acute Contact LD50
tox.bee_contact.body: Predicted dose (µg/bee) that causes 50% mortality upon direct physical contact. Used to evaluate field spray safety.

tox.fish.title: Fish Acute LC50 (96h)
tox.fish.body: Predicted concentration (mg/L) causing 50% mortality in rainbow trout or fathead minnow test sets after 96 hours of exposure.

tox.daphnia.title: Daphnia Acute EC50 (48h)
tox.daphnia.body: Predicted concentration (mg/L) resulting in immobilization or 50% effect rate in Daphnia magna after 48 hours.

tox.algae.title: Algae Growth Inhibition EC50 (72h)
tox.algae.body: Predicted concentration (mg/L) reducing green algae cell growth by 50% over a 72-hour exposure cycle.

tox.earthworm.title: Earthworm Acute LC50 (14d)
tox.earthworm.body: Predicted concentration (mg/kg dry soil) causing 50% mortality in earthworms after 14 days of soil contact.

tox.bird.title: Bird Acute Oral LD50
tox.bird.body: Predicted oral dose (mg/kg body weight) causing 50% mortality in Japanese quail or mallard ducks.

tox.mammalian_oral.title: Mammalian Acute Oral GHS
tox.mammalian_oral.body: Predicted GHS hazard category (1 to 5) for acute oral toxicity. Category 1 is highly toxic; Category 5 is non-toxic.

tox.sensitization.title: Skin Sensitization Alert
tox.sensitization.body: Binary classification predicting whether the compound triggers contact hypersensitivity or allergic contact dermatitis.

tox.irritation.title: Eye Irritation Alert
tox.irritation.body: Predicts whether the compound causes ocular irritation, conjunctival swelling, or reversible corneal opacity.

tox.mutagenicity.title: Ames Mutagenicity Alert
tox.mutagenicity.body: Binary classification predicting positive mutagenic response in Salmonella typhimurium strains (DNA damage liability).

studio.model_type.title: QSAR Model Type
studio.model_type.body: Regression models fit continuous properties (e.g. affinity, log solubility), while Classification models predict binary states (e.g. toxic vs safe).

studio.algorithm.title: ML Estimator Algorithm
studio.algorithm.body: Choose from ensemble tree methods (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting), SVM hyperplanes, or Ridge regularization linear regressors.

studio.shap.title: SHAP Attributions
studio.shap.body: SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) computes game-theoretic contribution weights highlighting which chemical features drive predictions.

studio.cv_folds.title: Cross-Validation Folds
studio.cv_folds.body: Splits the training dataset into K subsets to validate generalization capabilities and compute robust out-of-fold performance estimates.

crem.pharm.title: CReM-pharm Exclusions
crem.pharm.body: Excluded CReM pharmacophore guidance routines from default builds to prevent GPLv3 copyleft contagion within Edeon's commercial code.

docking.pocket_detect.title: Pocket Detection
docking.pocket_detect.body: Uses fpocket to automatically locate cavities, deep clefts, and potential binding sites on the receptor surface.

docking.receptor_prep.title: Receptor Preparation
docking.receptor_prep.body: Removes solvent molecules, adds polar hydrogens, calculates formal charges, and converts the target structure into PDBQT format.

library.smiles.title: SMILES Representation
library.smiles.body: Simplified Molecular Input Line Entry System. Represents chemical structures as strings for rapid RDKit featurization and processing.

reports.verdict.title: Registration Readiness Verdict
reports.verdict.body: Synthesizes AD status, ecotox safety margins, Persistence (DT50) limits, and Bioaccumulation (BCF) parameters into a regulatory dossier verdict.

reports.metabolites.title: Transformation Product Sweep
reports.metabolites.body: Simulates environmental transformation paths using syGMa rules (up to depth 2) and runs automated toxicity sweeps on predicted metabolites.
